title: Semester Commencement
description: Second Semester of the 2025/2026 Academic Year officially begins.

title: Undergraduate Registration with 60% Fee Payment
description: Undergraduate students must register with a minimum of 60% fee payment during this window.

title: Graduate Registration with 100% Fee Payment
description: Graduate students must register with full 100% fee payment during this window.

title: Late Registration Penalty Begins
description: Late registration after this date attracts a penalty of GH¢500 per week.

title: Mid-Semester Examinations
description: Mid-semester examinations for all students.

title: Revision Period
description: Revision week before end of semester examinations. Use this time wisely.

title: All Fees Final Deadline
description: All outstanding fees must be fully paid by this date.

title: Registration Period Ends
description: Final deadline for student registration. Late registration window closes.

title: End of Semester Examinations
description: End of semester examinations for all students.

title: New Year's Day
description: Public holiday celebrating the start of the new year.

title: Constitution Day
description: Public holiday marking the adoption of the 1992 Fourth Republic Constitution.

title: Independence Day
description: Public holiday marking Ghana's independence from British colonial rule.

title: Eid al-Fitr
description: Public holiday marking the end of Ramadan.

title: Good Friday
description: Christian public holiday commemorating the crucifixion of Jesus Christ.

title: Holy Saturday
description: Public holiday.

title: Easter Monday
description: Christian public holiday celebrating the resurrection of Jesus Christ.

title: May Day / Labour Day
description: National holiday dedicated to celebrating workers.

title: Africa Unity Day
description: Holiday celebrating the founding of the Organisation of African Unity.

title: Eid al-Adha
description: Islamic holiday commemorating Ibrahim's willingness to sacrifice his son.

title: Founders Day
description: Public holiday celebrating the founders of Ghana.

title: Kwame Nkrumah Memorial Day
description: Public holiday marking the birthday of Dr. Kwame Nkrumah, Ghana's first President.

title: Farmer's Day
description: National holiday honoring farmers and fishers for their contributions.

title: Christmas Day
description: Christian holiday celebrating the birth of Jesus Christ.

title: Boxing Day
description: Holiday celebrating the day after Christmas.
